subject: Can't log in - account locked
body: I tried my password too many times this morning and now I'm locked out of my laptop and email. Can you unlock my account? I have a client call in 30 minutes.

subject: New hire setup - Maria Chen
body: We have a new hire, Maria Chen, starting Monday in Sales. Please create her account, add her to the Sales distribution group, and assign an Office license.

subject: VPN keeps disconnecting
body: Since the update yesterday my VPN drops every few minutes when I work from home. I tried reconnecting several times, no luck.

subject: Outlook not syncing
body: My Outlook desktop hasn't received any new mail since last night, but webmail works fine. Restarting Outlook didn't help.

subject: Request: install Adobe Acrobat Pro
body: Could you please install Adobe Acrobat Pro on my workstation? I need to edit PDFs for the quarterly finance report.

subject: Suspicious email asking for my password
body: I received an email pretending to be IT, asking me to verify my password through a link. I did not click it. Reporting it just in case.

subject: 3rd floor printer not working
body: The big printer near the kitchen shows a paper jam error but there is no paper stuck. Nobody on the floor can print right now.

subject: Reset my password please
body: I forgot my password over the long weekend, can you reset it when you get a chance? Not urgent.

subject: Whole office internet is down
body: Nobody in the London office can connect to anything, the internet appears to be completely down. This is blocking the entire team.

subject: Add me to the Marketing shared mailbox
body: Please grant me access to the Marketing shared mailbox so I can handle incoming campaign replies.

subject: Laptop won't turn on
body: My company laptop is completely dead this morning, no lights when I press power even with the charger plugged in. I can't work at all.

subject: Need a license for Visio
body: Could you assign me a Visio license? I need it to draw network diagrams this week.

subject: Can't access the Finance shared drive
body: I'm getting 'access denied' on the Finance shared drive that I could open just last week.

subject: MFA not working on my new phone
body: I got a new phone and can't approve sign-in requests anymore; the Authenticator app isn't set up, so I can't sign in to anything.

subject: Too much spam getting through
body: Lots of spam emails are landing in my inbox lately. Can the filter be tightened?

subject: Printer toner low on 2nd floor
body: The 2nd floor printer says toner is low. Can someone replace the cartridge?

subject: VPN won't connect after password change
body: After I changed my password yesterday the VPN won't connect at all, it says authentication failed.

subject: Onboard a contractor for 2 weeks
body: Please set up a temporary account for a contractor, John Diaz, for two weeks, with access to the Project Falcon Teams.

subject: Outlook crashes on startup
body: Outlook crashes immediately every time I open it since this morning; webmail works fine though.

subject: My account is sending spam - hacked?
body: Colleagues say they received spam from my account overnight. I think I've been hacked.

subject: Request a second monitor
body: Could I get a second monitor for my desk? I'm working with large spreadsheets all day.

subject: WiFi slow in conference room B
body: WiFi is really slow in conference room B during meetings and it keeps dropping our video calls.

subject: Laptop asking for BitLocker recovery key
body: I can't boot my laptop, it's stuck asking for a BitLocker recovery key that I don't have. I can't get to my desktop.

subject: Microsoft Teams won't load
body: Teams is stuck on the loading screen and never opens. I already reinstalled it.

subject: Prepare laptop for new starter
body: We have a new starter next week. Can you prepare a laptop with the standard software image?

subject: Disable account - employee left
body: Please disable the account for Tom Becker. His last working day was Friday.

subject: Can't print to PDF from Word
body: When I choose 'print to PDF' in Word nothing happens, no file is created.

subject: Outgoing email is delayed
body: Emails I send are arriving 20-30 minutes late to external recipients lately.

subject: Fake invoice email going around
body: Several people on my team got the same fake invoice email with a link. Flagging it for awareness.

subject: Reset password for a service account
body: Can you reset the password for the svc-reports service account? Our nightly scheduled job is failing because of it.

subject: Wireless mouse stopped working
body: My wireless mouse stopped responding. I changed the batteries but still nothing.

subject: Need local admin rights to install a tool
body: I need local admin rights on my laptop so I can install a developer tool for my project.

subject: VPN access for a new hire
body: A new hire needs VPN access configured before Monday so they can work remotely.

subject: Office apps say license expired
body: I'm seeing 'license expired' banners in Word and Excel and can't edit documents.

subject: Alert: sign-in from another country
body: I got an alert that someone signed into my account from another country. That wasn't me.

subject: Add members to engineering distribution list
body: Please add Sara and Mike to the all-engineering distribution list.

subject: Laptop is extremely slow
body: My laptop has become extremely slow over the past week, it takes minutes to open anything.

subject: Can't join Zoom meetings
body: Zoom won't let me join meetings, it says connection error, even though my internet works fine.

subject: How do I set an out-of-office reply?
body: Can you tell me how to set up an automatic out-of-office reply in Outlook for next week?

subject: Where do I submit a software reimbursement?
body: Quick question - where do I submit a reimbursement for some software I bought for work?

subject: Meeting room screen won't show my laptop
body: The screen in meeting room 4 won't display my laptop over HDMI; the cable seems fine.

subject: My account keeps locking itself
body: This is the third time this week my account has locked itself out for no apparent reason.

subject: Critical: payroll system is down
body: The payroll application is down for the whole HR team and we are supposed to run payroll today.

subject: Assign me a Power BI Pro license
body: Please assign me a Power BI Pro license for the new reporting project.

subject: Email in my Sent folder I didn't write
body: There's an email in my Sent folder I never wrote. I'm worried my account is compromised.

subject: Docking station not charging laptop
body: When I connect to the docking station my laptop won't charge and the second monitor stays blank.

subject: Forgot password, board presentation in 1 hour
body: I can't log in, I've forgotten my password, and I have a board presentation in an hour. Please help!

subject: Guest WiFi for visitors tomorrow
body: We have visitors coming tomorrow. Can you set up guest WiFi access for them?

body: After the latest Windows update, our accounting application won't open anymore.

subject: Export my mailbox before laptop swap
body: Can you export my mailbox to a PST file before I switch to my new laptop?

subject: Can't access project SharePoint site
body: I joined the Falcon project but get access denied on the project SharePoint library.

subject: Set up MFA on my new iPhone
body: Got a new iPhone and need to register Microsoft Authenticator before I can sign in tomorrow.

subject: Computer freezing and very slow
body: My laptop freezes constantly and takes 5 minutes to open Chrome. Started last week.

body: Please create an account for new sales rep Alex Park starting Thursday with Sales group access.

body: Laptop was repaired and now asks for BitLocker recovery key at boot.

subject: Teams audio not working in meetings
body: Teams connects but nobody can hear me in meetings since yesterday.

subject: Offboard user who resigned
body: Please disable the account for Sam Lee who resigned effective today.

subject: Where is the employee handbook?
body: Where can I find the employee handbook on the intranet?

subject: Grant read access to Finance folder
body: Manager approved read access to \\fileserver\\Finance\\Q2 for my analyst.

subject: Excel says unlicensed after reinstall
body: Reinstalled Office and now Excel shows unlicensed product and won't save.
